name: stockyard-streamsnap
description: SSE stream capture with zero latency overhead. Record TTFT, tokens/sec, and full responses. Replay captured streams for testing.

tools.name: streamsnap_captures
tools.description: List recent stream captures with TTFT, tokens/sec, and metadata.

tools.name: streamsnap_get
tools.description: Get full captured stream content by ID.

tools.name: streamsnap_metrics
tools.description: Get aggregated streaming metrics: avg TTFT, avg tokens/sec, completion rate.

tools.name: streamsnap_replay
tools.description: Replay a captured stream as if it were live.

tools.name: streamsnap_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the StreamSnap proxy is running and healthy.
